theory.canonical_statement: ID 474 formalizes the management of chaotic neural interference categorized as emotional noise. By applying the weighted branch selector T,phic, the system differentiates between productive cognitive transitions and chaotic attractors. This ensures the Emotion Attic remains a structured repository by shunting excess entropy into the thermal bath. Bifurcation Control: Uses the phase weighted surplus phi to trigger branch switching at the TZP. Noise Shunting: Redirects chaotic emotional entropy to prevent loss of simple closure.
